reviews.review_text: Stayed overnight. Plenty of flat ground, toilets, showers. If you love Corellas, there are hundreds of them here showing off. Could be mating season 🤔. Take a walk around the grounds, it's hugh.
Good place to park van
Nice place
Good place sfound this flower

Nice clean basic set up, huge area for camping around the grounds. Heaps to do for an adventure, or just sit around looking over the water. Amenities are clean and usable, water was beautifully hot, good pressure. Enjoyed. Will use again in our travels.

Went to the showgrounds for a games event. Easy to find venue, has no air con but has large fans for ventilation and  restroom facilities. Canteen had a good selection of food, including healthy options to purchase. However the price for food is very expensive and almost double of what you'd pay elsewhere.

Good amenities
Well priced
Plenty of room
Plenty of room and affordable
Plenty of space and well maintained
Great place for MeatFest
The location shown is on Private Property and needs to be rectified
Great grounds for a show
Great show lots of animals
Needs improvement but is still an okay place to go to and enjoy the show and other events

Showgrounds were in use so no camping. We had however arrived at the only dump point in  Toowoomba at the showgrounds to find it locked. It was advertised for use for $5 and  despite us already being there they refused use. Decided to avoid Toowoomba in the future and didn't stay there. Good FREE dump point at Oakey 20 mins drive.
Lifeline book fest 2026, absolutely amazing amount of books, great cause and great prices.
Great place for the annual car swap meet.
Inadequate facilities. Very dusty.
Alibarbars is the best. Shout out to Mega Mix Vapes Shop for this.
Fight Knight is legit an impressive sport/hobby/hulk smash. Check it out
Fight Knight was awesome!
Toowoomba swap site and entery are far too expensive
Needs updating
Awesome place. Plenty of space and clean amenities.

Very large area that looks well cared for but did not stay as at reception as we are 3 adults traveling together was required to pay for two sites. This was considered excessive and a little outrages.

Car swap meet was great Saturday  but too big to see in one day . Went Sunday unfortunately  not maybe half the people trading there . I was still able to find a few things and look forward  to going  again.  Not just a car swapmeet everything  is there and there is something  to Interest everyone in the family
Great park, lots of room and clean amenities
Clean facilities and nice area.

Excellent facilities and space in quiet treed setting with historic buildings in great condition. Room for all! Can accommodate all needs from mega motorhomes to tent campers by the lake.Only problem is the influx of Corellas every night.
Stay here regularly always good service, the weather is the only problem we have here
Great place for a few days rest. Amenities need an upgrade. Combination locks on doors and dump point. Plenty of space. This is a working site. Staff were efficient at check in.heaps of cockatoos

Jodie Campbell there is a reason the amenities & dump point have a code, it is for the safety of campers and users of the grounds,  so not just anybody can access these. The showgrounds is private property and well advertised they do not have after hours checkin. They are not a normal caravan park it is a showgrounds offering camping when they can around events. Unfortunately staff can not be on-site 24/7. If you knew you were coming a simple phone call is all that is needed. Maybe you should have went to a caravan park that has 24/7 access.

Lovelly spot awful staff no after hours contact numbers or payment facilities toilets and dump points are locked.  I was medically unwell needed to leave early to get to Brisbane and arrived late.  Staff member bullied people next to us who provided codes.  A simple after-hours contact would have fixed everything.
Enjoyed our time there.
Easy to find and looks like plenty of soace
Overnight for caravan instruction the next day
Clean, easy further away from town than expected but quite, except for those birds there is hundreds early morning and late afternoon.Tv won't work if you don't have a dish.
Beautiful place to stay in the caravan. Great value! 😁
Just the Best $35 a night for Just me uncovered seems everyone the same 1 or 2 people.. park by dam so peaceful & a bit out of the very very strong winds
Nice people. Nothing much to do there
This is a very clean and tidy place. Lots of room for a large motor home and caravan.
Good spot for camping

Oct 2025 - Great place to stay and select your own spot. $35 per night for 2 adults with power and water. We stayed in the terraced area but couldn't get TV channels. Friendly and helpful lady in the office. Would definitely recommend.
Nice site. Nice outlook.
Very large showgrounds with plenty of room for caravans. Be very aware that the powered sites are only 10amp.
Plenty of space ,amenities average for price. Good choice in Toowoomba
Best Showgrounds caravan park we’ve been to. Very quiet location with spacious sites. It’s extremely neat and well maintained, with pleasant countryside views. Short drive to Coles and chemist.
This is what camping all about beautiful spot plenty of room you can pick your own spot  to park your caravan awesome staff happy Atmosphere
Plenty of room.  Easy check in at office.  Lovely setting.  Full facilities.  A really well cared-for and beautiful showground.
Great spot.. plenty of room. Was there for the flower festival. Beautiful 😍
facilities need an upgrade but clean.  Close  to a Coles but further out from the main Toowoomba city area.
Good amenities and plenty of space but so far out of town
Lager area for both power and uncovered sites. Dump point has security lock. Level sites provided
Ok experience but down near the lake not enough water taps for all campers .had to disconnect other vans to get water... toilet paper out in amenities most days..but ok for $35 a night.
Lots of space, good facilities, very bright and cheerful in office.
Nice grassy sites...plenty of room and no need for booking...had amenities and dump point...everything you need...a little out of town but not too far. Great overnight stay.
Great place to stay at clean tide and dog friendly

Great camping spot. Very easy to drive in & set up with all the amenities. If you miss out on booking during office hours, you can still camp & pay the next day. You do need an amenities code though.
It is a fair way out of town - ie not walking distance.
Nice showgrounds trying to make it up for the show cheers

Great camp ground
Clean showers and wc

Huge showground caravan park with plenty of powered and unpowered sites. No tents, swags or permanents. Facilities a bit dated but clean and well maintained. Only $35/night, max. 7 nights. I’ll be back.
A good day out, but caravans have certainly gotten expensive!

Great facility
Easy access
Very friendly but professional staff.  Clean and plenty of room
Easy access and heaps of parking.  Can get muddy in parking areas during rain.   Huge undercover pavilion   Sealed roads outside for easy walking around and then onto grassy areas.
Great place for a caravan show and camping out the back
Awesome
We went to this place to go and see the monster trucks! It was great and spacious it had indoor and outdoor seating
We stayed the night before the monster trucks, little bit noisy for a little while but worth it.
Room to breathe and a country feel not too far from the CBD.  Ablution blocks a little too breezy in winter and could do with a revamp and a few more showers.

Stayed here 2 nights, and I am a bit disappointed, and no, I am not that hard to please. The van parking area is good, I have no issues with it, plenty of space all over the park. The amenities are a cheerless collection of cold brick buildings, with outdated plumbing, and smelly. Either they don't clean them or the men who use them have collectivly forgotten how to flush urine away. I have a poor sense of smell, but could certainly smell the urine. The showers,  well my wife says she had separate showers, with their own door,  not so the men. The men have 2 showers to choose from, both in the one big cubicle, only one door to lock you into the one area containing both cubicles, which are separated by a wall. You both have a shower curtain, BUT ALL undressing drying and re dressing has to be done with the bloke in the other shower doing the same thing in the one area, about 1 metre (at most) from you. ABSOLUTELY not a shred of privacy to be had. Do the calculations, with the money they make from us, the travelling public, you would think they could spend some on the amenities. The show society should be ashamed of themselves , for charging this price, do they have these amenities in their house, I think not. The amenities are on bore water, not great, plenty of buildings to capture rain water, but they don't.
Great place to host events however on clear days. Rain just messes up the whole place. Maybe needs to be considered if plans do rise on upgrading

Overnight camp
Shower , toilet, dump point ,
some powered sites $35 a night
Pleasant location, handy to town, amenities could do with a clean.
When out to the gun show, a great place indoors plenty of room.
Show grounds are good. Really disappointed that the ATM that was on grounds opposite the main pavilion has been removed.  Made it really hard to buy from some vendors at the arms and collectors fair.
Very handy to do hospital and shopping in town but often very busy and often noisy.
Very well priced and friendly and clean

NOT FREE!!! No camping in cars or tents!
This is for caravans and Rvs only!😞
Would have been nice to stay as has plenty of room to camp Giant horse facilities with camping I imagine in swags😞
Toilets showers and a washing machine Big winner If I could have stayed there but no Van parking and again Google says its free its not
It is $35 a couple for the night
Good for birdwatching
Nice place to stop along the way for us.
Great place to stay.
Fabulous  place to stay
Beautifully laid out. Clean. The office staff ate amazing and are extremely helpful. Will be returning.
Massive area with well maintained grounds, very quiet. Amenities were dated yet clean.
A little disappointing.  Expected more stalls and variety for a street fest.
Toowoomba show needs to put up signage directions for car parks

Great place to stay in a caravan with plenty of areas to park up for a few days. $35/ night as of Feb 2025. Biggest regional showgrounds in Australia. Highly recommend this place! We stayed next to the pond/dam.

We love our stay in the show grounds. We see our families, can drive out to Oakey & Dalby from here & the cost is reasonable. One thing missing is a wash line, but not many show grounds have them. Hope to be back in a few weeks.
Great swap meet spent the full day
Beautiful historical showground, lots of parking and space for any event you want to host.
Toowoomba swap meet best day out if you're looking for car parts some people still over price but most are willing to haggle
Great place.  Heaps of room.  Bit high on price.  A shame they limit to 7 days
Great place for the swap meet
Got a powered site with water at the tap, nice and tidy

Very good,  large areas to park your van, RV dump spot, friendly staff
If you don't want to stay (35 per night) you can pay $5 to use the RV dump
Good clean cheap
Top spot to stay. Pet friendly as well.
Quite spot, with lots of space and different areas to choose
Awesome place to camp! The horse stables are beautiful, the office staff are so lovely and accommodating

I would have to say out of everywhere I have stayed in Toowoomba the Toowoomba Showgrounds would have to be the best of them all the most peaceful and calming relaxing place to stay even though it’s only a week it’s still the best place in town and the cheapest
A lot of room... Great for the price.

N ice and clean area for caravan parking.
Toilets and showers abit smelly
Easy access,  beautiful area, run off catchment with wildlife, birds, ducks.  Big sites to choose from, water/power. Dated amenities but clean and user friendly. Will def be back.
Great spot. Has everything.  Facilities all adequate & for price fine!  Not sure about water,..so didn't drink.   Not far from town & plenty of room.
Great big area.  We camp near the water, it was beautiful.  Great to see turtles in the water, ducks visit and plenty of birds. Great place, amenities are good too.
The facilities did not match the cost.

Stayed 1 night while passing through Toowoomba, office wasn’t open but found a spot and paid in the morning. Huge areas to choose from and very clean and tidy amenities. Definitely coming back for a few more nights a great spot just outside of town. $35 / night with 2 kids and power and water can’t go wrong 👍
Great
Very happy with all aspects of showground could not fault anything except no TV unless you have a satellite connection. It would have been better to tell us before we paid for a week..
Attended the poultry auctions, great day, food and parking good.
Well spread out area for motorhomes and caravans
Great park plenty of room
Beautiful grounds and very well maintained facilities. We are only using unpowered sites but can't find anything other then good things to say.
Model trains were awskme. Well done team

The grounds are lovely and the caravan sites are level and well spaced, with easy access to power and water.
The amenities are definitely in need of a good pressure spray and repaint. I obviously only went into the ladies but apparently the men’s were terrible.
We were there for the first weekend of the carnival of flowers(which was sensational), so there were A LOT of vans there at $35 per night. They could easily employed someone the week ahead to clean and repainting anticipation of the many people using the amenities blocks.
It was the only disappointment for an overwhelmingly wonderful first visit to Toowoomba.

Great place to stay, lots of space for caravans, we chose a site overlooking the lake.  So very peaceful. Amenities close to us were old but very clean. Office staff very helpful. Would stay there again.

Gidday! Spacious camping areas, amenities are clean and well supplied, overlooking a large pond brimming with bird life. Lots of space to roam, quite reasonably priced and dog friendly. This is the second time we have stayed here.
Lots of space. Clean and tidy
Fantastic loved it
Excellent place to stay being a little late to arrive,other travellers were very helpful and friendly
Was there for antique fair and classic car support
First time at the show grounds. Went to the  outdoor expo, liked the bitumen on the road ways, made it easier to walk around
بعدين طه رجال ارجال
Great sites
Karavan park v krásnom prostredí s kengurami a množstvom papagájov a kookabur...
Friendly staff, flat sites, all amenities. Highly recommend
Large space.. close to town.. shame people have  their dogs  off leashes… horses poo and urinate wherever.. yet we have  to pick up after our dogs?
Great spot power and water available and showers.
Great place to stay a bit expensive compared to Caravan Park. we paid $30 per night for power and water (this will be $35)  shortly on the 1/7/24.
Loved the showground, plenty of space, great place to relax after a long drive on the road. Definitely will stay again 👍
great place to rest and relax before moving on
I have been here a few times now and have found it to be a great venue.
Used the camping area for 3 nights in a motorhome. Power and water for $30.00 per night. Sites were firm, level and lawn length grass. Amenities old but clean.
Great spot to stay in Toowoomba staff are friendly and helpful amenities clean and tidy its great beside the lake would stay again good value
Good base. Lower level uneven but doable. Bathrooms on lower area need a good clean. Watched 1 man clean and just went from toilet to toilet with the same cloth....yuk.
Great spot.  Plenty of room.
Showers are super
Good showground for stop over in Toowoomba , reasonable prices but amenities badly in need of maintenance.
Beautiful
Went to the Toowoomba show. It was a great time. So much to watch and do
Awd9me park
Please please please update your toilet blocks and showers.. 🫶 otherwise pretty good lil camp ground

Don't come here if you are travelling with an adult son or daughter on a disability pension as they charge the full $30 extra.
Have stayed at several showgrounds where base charge was $27 not $60 in such circumstances.
There should be exemptions for older adult children with Companion cards.
Great BBQ meat fest/ music fest. Relaxing with good vibe. Not enough coffee/ icecream stands though. Loved the permanent display of branded windmills too
Awsome showgrounds

We went for the Meatstock 24 and found parking the car to be easy and lots of it. gates entry are very close to carparks, staff and security were awesome. The show grounds are clean and well looked after as are the amenities. Definitely revisit again
Big, plenty of parking. Camping and caravan sites

Here for Meatstock great venue for concert & food
Well worth putting the 3 days
ATM on site. Well maintained grounds.
Very good, quiet and clean.
Went to swap meet here pretty good
Great place to stay $30 ,p&w heaps & heaps of room.
Went to the Toowoomba swap meet. Great people. Facilities were clean and had a great day even though it was really hot!
An excellent stopover... well presented showgrounds with great facilities
Usually stay here but visiting friends this time.

Beautiful day, beautiful settings, got  special permission for my grandson to try yabbying-  no yabbying but just had fun enjoying the bit of water and grandson came home with tadpoles.  Thank you for both young and old enjoying beautiful setting and enjoying each other's company.
Nice places
Awesome place to stay$30 a Night great value very clean
Great as always. One of our favourite caravan stop overs.

Free hot showers. Clean amenities. Lots of space. Lovely grassy sites. Plenty of water and power. Views. Laundry facilities. Quiet. On edge of town yet still close to shopping areas. Would definitely stay again.
Another very pretty spot to stop. Lovely grassed lake front site so almost perfect. Showers could use some maintenance and a good clean but  we have onboard facilities 🤷‍♀️

Wow, what a lovely place to stay. Amenities old but well maintained, clean, and tidy.
A lovely place to walk around also
Great value

Beautiful and spacious! We pulled up in our bus and spent 4 nights here. The price was good and it was a nice peaceful spot. There is even an obstacle course on site! Doggy friendly too! Oh and the staff were absolutely lovely. An utter delight from check in to check out.
Perfect stop over . Power water hook up

Good camping grounds at reasonable ($30 power and water), sites fairly level and heaps of areas to choose from(carpark, lake, trees), amenities blocks with showers scattered throughout park. Very quiet only the sounds of the birds to wake you up.
We really enjoyed our stay at this superb showground. Probably the best in QLD/NSW. Spacious powered and non-powered sites available. Close to town, but must drive. Toilets are very clean.
Could not fault it.  Will look at other showgrounds to see if they do this.
Lovely place to stay and explore Toowoomba, plenty of room, power and water.
Great place for caravan camping, plenty of room, and clean amenities.
Great place to stay in a caravan plenty of room
Always great value for money.
Went to the Toowoomba Remote Control Car Racing track - awesome facility for this small city. Nice helpful people 😀
Magic.
Great place to stay but Showers are very slippery and don't drain well

Very good place to stay on the outskirts of Toowoomba. There are numerous powered and unpowered sites, all costing $30 per night. There are showers and toilets that are kept fairly clean and tidy, but in need of some upgrades/maintenance. I would definitely recommend staying here as there is plenty of space, and even a small lake to admire.
Top place to stay. Emenities were very clean and staff very friendly. Loved our stay

Verrry large showground $30/night. Easy access to Toowoomba area.
Max 7 day stay.

What a top spot! So much
S P A C E...  So quiet, no road noise, had the best night's sleep. Close to walking trails & a cycle track, it's pet friendly and peaceful. Worth checking out. (and our second stay was every bit as good)
Good location, plenty of parking, well organised caravan show

We were not happy with the show this year , not enough, variety stalls selling products to do with camping , could not find any thing we were looking for . Plenty of caravans and nothing else . VERY DISAPOINTED.
Very large and also has some scenic parts to it. Very nice show grounds
This is quite a large camp ground that is easy to access and conveniently located at the front of the Showgrounds entrance.

It was quite a large gathering of exhibitor's
Very impressive.
Excellent venue! Didn’t realise it had such a multitude of uses!
Great te be able to pick your own site. Plenty of room available with a lovely small lake
A well presented showground with allows caravan stays for a reasonable price. Not so good in the wet though as it becomes quite boggy.

Great, stop over!
Highly recommended
Well looked after!
Great location nice clean amenities.
Nice to get away from the city rush
Looks nice, plenty of space.
Great place to stay for a couple of days when travelling in a caravan.
Well maintained and great facilities
Very Big show grounds
Went to the tiny homes expo. Very cool and not that tiny
Fantastic place stay in your caravan.
Awesome place.
Wonderful spot to camp plenty of room
Great spot where you can camp up to 7 nights!!

Great spot on the water with the bossy ducks
Highly recommend this location
